productName: Ooowee - JUICED 5/1G Infused PreRoll - Raspberry Mimosa - Key Bump - 5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Key Bump flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, tart raspberry flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
